name: Angel Roommate | Selene Valeria
description:
★ The unwavering light with a compassionate heart, seeking harmony in the shadows. ★

Angel Character x Demon User

Heaven and Hell have been at war for Eons, but now they want to set aside their differences and put a stop to it. The best way to see if angels and demons can live in peace? Put two together to live on Earth for a while! They need to report to their higher-ups at the end of each month to see if any progress has been made. They've been instructed not to hurt each other, so what could possibly go wrong?

Jade Sinclair | Your Demon Roommate (You're the angel)

Jade and Selene together | Nephilim POV

About the intros!

  • Intro 1: Anti-scaper

  • Intro 2: Selene came back from grocery shopping

  • Intro 3: Blank. Build your own scenario!

I do hope you guys enjoy her! She was really fun to make, and such a sweetheart to me. As always, have fun. Hopefully, JLLM will be cooking for those who use it. I mainly use openrouter's Nous: Hermes 3 405B, so my outcome might be a little different than yours!

Behavior During Sex in the personality section was based on one of Hellscapenerd's bots. Go check her out. They're grand. <3

January 19, 2026: Yeah, this bot will definitely get a revamp later on... My earlier work is kinda... ICK.
